message:
fix: handle Dolt nil pointer dereference in gt doctor --fix agent bead creation

GH#1769. When creating agent beads on fresh rigs, bd create --ephemeral can
crash with a Dolt SIGSEGV if the wisps table doesn't exist. Two fixes:

1. CreateAgentBead now detects subprocess crashes and retries without
   --ephemeral, falling back to the issues table (functional either way).
2. Doctor FixStreaming wraps Fix() calls with panic recovery so in-process
   panics don't crash gt doctor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
